description: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.
